items.arabic_text: ((ذَهَبَ الظَّمَأُ وَابْتَلَّتِ العُرُوقُ، وَثَبَتَ الْأَجْرُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ)).
items.english_text: (The thirst has gone and the veins are quenched, and reward is confirmed, if Allah wills.)

items.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ الَّتِي وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي)).
items.english_text: (O Allah, I ask You by Your mercy which envelopes all things, that You forgive me.)
items.transliteration: (Allahumma inne as-aluka birahmatikal-latee wasiAAat kulla shay, an taghfira lee.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahumma inne as-aluka birahmatikal-latee wasiAAat kulla shay, an taghfira lee.)
